name: list_bubbles
description: List all spaces/bubbles in the multiverse. Use when user asks what spaces they have.

name: create_bubble
description: Create a new space/bubble. Use when user wants to create a new space like 'create a space for cooking' or 'make a new bubble for project ideas'.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Name for the new space (e.g., 'Cooking', 'Project Ideas', 'Travel Plans')

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description of what this space is for

name: get_bubble_stats
description: Get statistics about a space including note count and score. Use when user asks 'how developed is this idea' or 'what's in this space'.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of the space to check (optional if user is inside a space)

name: score_bubble
description: Calculate and update a space's score based on its content. Use when user wants to evaluate an idea.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of the space to score (optional if user is inside a space)

name: evaluate_bubble_evolution
description: Use AI to evaluate how evolved/complete a bubble's ideas are. Scores on completeness, structure, actionability, and depth. Use when user asks 'how evolved is this idea', 'evaluate this bubble', or wants detailed AI analysis of a space.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of the space to evaluate (optional if user is inside a space)

name: promote_bubble
description: Promote a space/idea to a project. Use when user says 'turn this into a project' or 'promote this idea'.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of the space to promote (optional if user is inside a space)

name: delete_bubble
description: Delete a space/bubble. Use when user wants to remove a space.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of the space to delete

name: enter_bubble
description: Enter a space to work on ideas inside it. Use when user says 'enter my cooking space' or 'go into project ideas'.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of the space to enter

name: exit_bubble
description: Exit the current space and return to the multiverse. Use when user says 'go back', 'exit', or 'return to multiverse'.
